docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BROSNAN, PATRICK DBA BROSNAN PLUMBING AS TO DEFENDANT HENDERSON, WILL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE SUBMITTED, BY PLAINTIFF, **AFTER** COURT DISMISSAL
